Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: The pleasant aroma of freshly-crushed lavenders soon replaces the savory tones in the air. What *isn't* pleasant, however--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: His chair shrieks across the wood as it flies back, preceded by French Kweebec rising to his feet with the forcefulness of a rampaging wolf.

Line.Text: Is this some bizarre human concept of entertainment ? To ruin someone's jardin out of boredom ? If you are feeling understimulated, you could have--
